_note: SHA-256 hex digests of DripShopLive product images that are placeholders (generic 'image coming soon'-type stand-ins, used across many products that don't have a real photo uploaded yet). main.py downloads each candidate image, hashes it, and skips any whose hash matches. To add a new entry, run: uv run python -m tools.hash_placeholder <url>

placeholders.notes: First known placeholder, reported by Noah after spotting it in a daily-post preview.
